summary: Iteration 4 - Business Key Login Feature. Full backend (24 tests) and frontend (Playwright) testing completed. All Business Key login features verified end-to-end. Every test passed: key validation, SA/BA/Dept login with correct keys, cross-business key prevention, /api/auth/demo endpoint, SA Clients page with copy buttons, and success toast with business key on new client creation.

design_issues.screen: SAClients - Create Client modal (Business Type select)
issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: '<span> cannot be child of <option>/<select>'. Same as iteration_2/3 - caused by Emergent visual editor debug spans injected into select options. Not a code bug, no user impact.

feature_verification.login_key_field_above_email: PASS - Key field at y=413, email at y=517 (key is above)
feature_verification.demo_credentials_sa_key: PASS - Shows 'SA' key in Super Admin demo row
feature_verification.demo_credentials_biz_key_loaded: PASS - Shows 'EOW-69RH8F' for Business Admin and Department User (fetched from /api/auth/demo)
feature_verification.click_demo_fills_form: PASS - All 3 demo rows fill key/email/password correctly
feature_verification.wrong_key_fails: PASS - WRONG-KEY + valid BA creds returns 401, stays on login page
feature_verification.missing_key_422: PASS - POST /api/auth/login without key field returns 422
feature_verification.sa_clients_page_business_key: PASS - All 4 clients show business_key (e.g. EOW-69RH8F) with Copy button (data-testid='copy-key-{id}')
feature_verification.new_client_creation_toast: PASS - Toast shows: 'Client created! Business Key: TEZ-Z9GKQ7. Share this key with the business admin for login.'
feature_verification.key_format_abc_xxxxxx: PASS - All generated keys match regex ^[A-Z]{3}-[A-Z0-9]{6}$
feature_verification.key_strip_spaces: PASS - ' SA ' with spaces works after strip()

critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. All 13 test scenarios from the review request pass.

The /api/auth/demo endpoint finds the first non-TEST_ client using MongoDB find_one without a sort. This could return a different client if multiple non-TEST_ clients exist. Consider adding sort by created_at ascending to always return the original demo client reliably.
Business key generation (generate_business_key) retries up to 20 times to ensure uniqueness. Good defensive coding.
seed_data_creation: Created and deactivated 2 test clients: TEST_KeyTest Hotel (BWN-ZQXKCL) and TEST_Toast_1771590639 (TEZ-Z9GKQ7). These appear in SA clients list as Paused.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Key login feature fully implemented and tested. Login page shows Key field, demo section has dynamic biz key from /api/auth/demo. All 3 roles login with correct keys. Wrong key / cross-key prevention works. SA Clients page shows business_key with copy button. New client creation shows key in success toast. Grand Hotel key=EOW-69RH8F. Minor pre-existing issue: Emergent visual editor span/select hydration warning in Create Client modal (no user impact). Two test clients created in DB: TEST_KeyTest Hotel (BWN-ZQXKCL, Paused) and TEST_Toast_1771590639 (TEZ-Z9GKQ7, Active).
